# Fixture 03 — Schedule-level FOLLOWS (Schedule → Schedule)
# Plan §2.1, §6 step 7 (cross-schedule dependency linking with .@ wildcard).

SCHEDULE WORKSTATION_A#MASTER#NIGHTLY_INFRA_CHECK
  ON RUNCYCLE EVERY_WEEKDAY VALIDFROM 01/01/2025
  AT 0200
:
  CHECK_DISK
    SCRIPTNAME "/apps/ops/check_disk.sh"
    STREAMLOGON ops_user
    RECOVERY STOP
END

SCHEDULE WORKSTATION_A#MASTER#DAILY_SALES_LOAD
  ON RUNCYCLE EVERY_WEEKDAY VALIDFROM 01/01/2025
  AT 0530
  FOLLOWS WORKSTATION_A#MASTER#NIGHTLY_INFRA_CHECK.@
:
  EXTRACT_ORDERS
    SCRIPTNAME "/apps/abinitio/run.sh extract.mp"
    STREAMLOGON tws_user
    RECOVERY STOP
END
